'''鈭歳-w-t''' ('''karawat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumatize|pneumatize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-w-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumatize|pneumatize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-w-t
|-
! Lemma
| karawat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirawat|thirawat]] || [[word:jirawat|jirawat]] || [[word:shirawat|shirawat]] || [[word:kirawat|kirawat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurawat|thuthurawat]] || [[word:jujurawat|jujurawat]] || [[word:shushurawat|shushurawat]] || [[word:kukurawat|kukurawat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurawat|thurawat]] || [[word:jurawat|jurawat]] || [[word:shurawat|shurawat]] || [[word:kurawat|kurawat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurawat|thurawat]] || [[word:jurawat|jurawat]] || [[word:shurawat|shurawat]] || [[word:kurawat|kurawat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therawat|therawat]] || [[word:jerawat|jerawat]] || [[word:sherawat|sherawat]] || [[word:kerawat|kerawat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorawat|thothorawat]] || [[word:jojorawat|jojorawat]] || [[word:shoshorawat|shoshorawat]] || [[word:kokorawat|kokorawat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorawat|thorawat]] || [[word:jorawat|jorawat]] || [[word:shorawat|shorawat]] || [[word:korawat|korawat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorawat|thorawat]] || [[word:jorawat|jorawat]] || [[word:shorawat|shorawat]] || [[word:korawat|korawat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙rawat|th忙rawat]] || [[word:j忙rawat|j忙rawat]] || [[word:sh忙rawat|sh忙rawat]] || [[word:k忙rawat|k忙rawat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharawat|thatharawat]] || [[word:jajarawat|jajarawat]] || [[word:shasharawat|shasharawat]] || [[word:kakarawat|kakarawat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharawat|tharawat]] || [[word:jarawat|jarawat]] || [[word:sharawat|sharawat]] || [[word:karawat|karawat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharawat|tharawat]] || [[word:jarawat|jarawat]] || [[word:sharawat|sharawat]] || [[word:karawat|karawat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharawat|sharawat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharawat|gosharawat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharawat|gokisharawat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharawatn眉|sharawatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharawatnkn眉|gosharawatnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharawatn眉|gokisharawatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharawatsh毛|sharawatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharawatnksh毛|gosharawatnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharawatsh毛|gokisharawatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharawatro|sharawatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharawatnkro|gosharawatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharawatro|gokisharawatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharawatmu|sharawatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharawatnkmu|gosharawatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharawatmu|gokisharawatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharawatsher|sharawatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharawatnksher|gosharawatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharawatsher|gokisharawatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharawatng|sharawatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharawatnkng|gosharawatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharawatng|gokisharawatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharawatya|sharawatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharawatnkya|gosharawatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharawatya|gokisharawatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharawatyam|sharawatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharawatnkyam|gosharawatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharawatyam|gokisharawatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharawatn眉sh毛|sharawatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharawatnkn眉sh毛|gosharawatnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharawatn眉sh毛|gokisharawatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharawatn眉ro|sharawatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharawatnkn眉ro|gosharawatnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharawatn眉ro|gokisharawatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharawatn眉mu|sharawatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharawatnkn眉mu|gosharawatnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharawatn眉mu|gokisharawatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharawatsh毛n眉|sharawatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharawatnksh毛n眉|gosharawatnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharawatsh毛n眉|gokisharawatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharawatsh毛ro|sharawatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharawatnksh毛ro|gosharawatnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharawatsh毛ro|gokisharawatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharawatsh毛mu|sharawatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharawatnksh毛mu|gosharawatnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharawatsh毛mu|gokisharawatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharawatron眉|sharawatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharawatnkron眉|gosharawatnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharawatron眉|gokisharawatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharawatrosh毛|sharawatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharawatnkrosh毛|gosharawatnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharawatrosh毛|gokisharawatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharawatromu|sharawatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharawatnkromu|gosharawatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharawatromu|gokisharawatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharawatmun眉|sharawatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharawatnkmun眉|gosharawatnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharawatmun眉|gokisharawatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharawatmush毛|sharawatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharawatnkmush毛|gosharawatnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharawatmush毛|gokisharawatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharawatmuro|sharawatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharawatnkmuro|gosharawatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharawatmuro|gokisharawatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
